resultList.dtldesc: 5 BHK Residential House available for sale. Located in the rapidly developing neighbourhood of Banashankari 6th Stage 7th Block Bangalore this spacious 5 BHK independent house offers a perfect blend of comfort connectivity and longterm investment value. Positioned opposite Rajatha Vidya Kendra School and within a wellplanned residential layout the property is ideal for families seeking a readytomovein home in a peaceful yet wellconnected part of South Bangalore. This eastfacing residential house is built across a G3 configuration and spans a generous builtup area of 3500 sq. ft offering ample space for large family living. The layout comprises five wellappointed bedrooms and five bathrooms ensuring privacy and convenience for all occupants. The home also features two balconies overlooking the main road allowing good ventilation and natural light throughout the interiors. The property comes fully furnished with thoughtfully designed interiors. It includes a modular kitchen with a combined layout equipped for everyday functionality. The flooring is finished with premium marble adding elegance and durability to the space. The overall design ensures a seamless blend of comfort and practicality making it suitable for immediate occupancy. The house is equipped with essential amenities including a reliable water supply and power backup ensuring uninterrupted daily living. It also offers covered parking for one car. The property is located within a welldeveloped residential layout providing a secure and convenient environment for families. Banashankari 6th Stage is a prominent residential suburb in South Bangalore known for its planned development and growing infrastructure. It is strategically located between major roads such as Kanakapura Road and NICE Road offering strong connectivity to different parts of the city. The property enjoys proximity to essential facilities with hospitals located within approximately 2 km and Kengeri Metro Station around 2.5 km away ensuring smooth commuting. The area is also close to schools markets and daily conveniences making it suitable for family living. With its peaceful surroundings improving infrastructure and connectivity to employment hubs Banashankari 6th Stage is increasingly becoming a preferred residential destination in Bangalore.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover the perfect blend of luxury and comfort with this stunning 3 BHK flat for sale in Gunjur, Bangalore Boasting a spacious super area of 1700 sqft, this residence is located on the 5th floor of a modern 24-story building and is designed to be vaastu compliant with an east-facing orientation, ensuring a harmonious living environment.Property specificationsThis beautifully furnished flat includes essential features such as two wardrobes, a dressing table, false ceiling, a mirror, and a sink. The layout comprises three bedrooms and three bathroomstwo attached and one commonall designed in a contemporary western style and equipped with geyser fittings for your convenience.The expansive living cum dining area is perfect for family gatherings and entertaining guests, while two balconiesone attached to the living room and another linked to a bedroomoffer delightful views of the city. A charming sit-out area provides additional space for relaxation. The modular kitchen comes complete with a chimney and stove, making it ideal for your culinary adventures. The flooring throughout the flat features elegant vitrified tiles.FacilitiesEnjoy the convenience of covered parking along with 24-hour water supply and 100 power backup to ensure uninterrupted living. Security is a top priority, with a dedicated security guard on-site and CCTVs installed for your peace of mind. The building is equipped with three lifts for easy access. Residents can indulge in a variety of amenities, including a swimming pool, both open and indoor gyms, facilities for indoor and outdoor games, a play area for children, a home theatre, a clubhouse, and a guest house.LocalitySituated within close proximity to TCIS School, just 500-600 meters away, this flat is conveniently located near Manipal Hospital for healthcare needs. Forum Mall, along with Max and Croma, is within 1 km, offering a range of shopping options. The property is directly opposite the Gunjur bus stop, enhancing public transport accessibility, while several banks and ATMs are within 100-200 meters. KR Railway Station is nearby, and the metro station is approximately 6-7 km away, providing excellent connectivity to the rest of the city.

Ideal for those seeking comfort and connectivity, this home offers a premium lifestyle in a sought-after neighborhood.Property Specifications This charming 2 BHK flat in United Sai Silicon City, Whitefield, offers a comfortable and modern living space. With a super built-up area of 1150 sqft, this semi-furnished home is located on the 4th floor of a 4-story building. The flat is equipped with essential furnishings such as a sofa, dining table, beds, and air conditioners to enhance your comfort.It features two spacious bedrooms, one attached bathroom with a geyser and one common bathroom with Western fittings. The flat also has a balcony attached to the living room, offering a view of the surrounding buildings. The separate living and dining area provides ample space for relaxation and entertainment. The modular kitchen is fitted with a chimney, and the utility area attached to the kitchen adds convenience. With vitrified flooring throughout and Vastu compliance, this flat promises a harmonious and stylish living experience.Facilities Covered parking is available for residents, providing secure parking for your vehicle. The property benefits from a 24-hour borewell water supply and 100 power backup to ensure uninterrupted services. Safety and security are prioritized with round-the-clock security guards and CCTV surveillance across the premises. The building is equipped with a lift, making it easily accessible for all residents.This property offers premium amenities including a clubhouse, swimming pool, gym, park, kids play area, and multipurpose courts. Enjoy a grand entrance lobby, intercom facility, maintenance staff, and waste disposal. The property also features a banquet hall, conference room, indoor games room, kids play pool with water slides, and a large open space, ensuring a luxurious and convenient lifestyle for all.Locality Located along the Vijaynagar Main Road, this property enjoys excellent connectivity to key areas. Schools and hospitals are within 1 km, making it highly convenient for families. Malls and supermarkets are just a short 5 km away, providing easy access to shopping and essentials. Banks and ATMs are nearby for your convenience, and public transport, including buses and autos, is easily available, ensuring seamless travel within the city. This locality offers both comfort and accessibility for a modern lifestyle.
